description:
Body of `POST /test/pinch` (Step 9 (c), T015).

`center` is window-local pixel coordinates of the pinch focal point. `scale > 1.0` zooms in, `scale < 1.0` zooms out, `scale = 1.0` is a no-op. `duration_ms = 0` is rejected with HTTP 422 (`PinchError::ZeroDuration`); the upper bound is 10 000 ms (mirror of swipe).

`Eq` is intentionally omitted: `f32` is not `Eq` (NaN is not reflexive).
title: PinchRequest
